title: Document Meshtastic app compatibility support matrix for R1 MVP
description: Why this exists: users must understand that LICHEN supports a local Meshtastic app interface but not Meshtastic RF mesh compatibility. What needs to be done: produce the compatibility matrix consumed by project-LICHEN-ev5b.7: supported app discovery/pairing screens, node info/status/config fields, send/receive message flows, unsupported app features, known placeholders, and troubleshooting symptoms. Acceptance criteria: docs match implemented and smoke-tested behavior; unsupported features are explicit; RF non-compatibility is unambiguous; every remaining gap has a Bead.
close_reason: Completed Meshtastic app compatibility support matrix + limitations docs in docs/meshtastic-users.md (synthetic metadata, supported flows, explicit errors, RF non-compat warning); matches implemented t2hn.6-9 + smoke-tested t2hn.11 behavior and test vectors; every gap has linked Bead; three codereview passes passed with no P0/P1/P2 findings.
